detail: Boundary extension may open only through an explicit shadow-only policy shift, never by silent refresh from existing raw coverage.
The existing lockout-aligned derivation boundary remains authoritative until the shift is explicitly approved.
The shadow replay lane must remain read-only and protocol-first during any boundary-extension work.
Boundary extension may not be used to smuggle execution authority into reentry, unlock, or add.
Daily-state and phase-geometry surfaces must be extended together; one-sided extension is not sufficient.
Do not debate post-lockout unlock quality until the board surfaces themselves have been explicitly extended.
Reentry-to-add handoff remains blocked during checklist/prelaunch work and does not reopen just because extension is being considered.
Program and frontier status cards must be refreshed when and only when the policy actually shifts.
